questionText: Explain why not and whether you plan to conduct methane leak detection and repair or adopt other methods to find and fix fugitive methane emissions from your coal mining activities.
questionKo: 그 이유를 설명 not 및 whether you plan to conduct methane leak detection 및 repair 또는 adopt other methods to find 및 fix fugitive methane emissions from your coal mining activities.
simpleHelp: For many reasons, organizations with coal production activities may not have a program in place to reduce methane emissions using LDAR. This question is developed to provide investors with information on why organizations with coal activities do not have an LDAR program in place.

guidance.text: This question only appears if you select "No, we do not have a program in place" or "No, this is not relevant to our operations" in response to 7.60.
guidance.textKo: This 문항 only appears 만약 you select "No, we do not have a program in place" 또는 "No, this is not relevant to our operations" in response to 7.60.

guidance.text:
General 
If methane emissions are relevant to your organization's operations, give a company-specific description why you do not conduct LDAR or other methods to fix and find methane emissions.
Explain whether you plan to implement LDAR or other methods to fix and find methane emissions. 
If you are planning to implement LDAR or other methods to find and fix methane emissions, then describe these plans and provide implementation timelines. 
If LDAR or other methods of methane leak detection are not relevant to your organization's operations, give a company-specific description why not.
guidance.textKo: 일반 만약 methane emissions are relevant to 귀사의 operations, give a company-specific description why you do not conduct LDAR 또는 other methods to fix 및 find methane emissions. Explain whether you plan to implement LDAR 또는 other methods to fix 및 find methane emissions. 만약 you are planning to implement LDAR 또는 other methods to find 및 fix methane emissions, then 설명 these plans 및 provide implementation timelines. 만약 LDAR 또는 other methods of methane leak detection are not relevant to 귀사의 operations, give a company-specific description why not.

criteria.criteria:
Text answer provided - 2 points
A maximum of 2/2 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: Text answer 입력 - 2 점 이 문항에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 2/2점입니다.

criteria.criteria:
Full Disclosure points must be awarded to be eligible for Management points
ROUTE A)
'No, this is not relevant to our operations' selected in question 7.60 - 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
'No, we do not have a program in place' selected in question 7.60 - 0/1 point
A maximum of 0/1 point is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: Full Disclosure 점수를 획득해야 합니다 to be 획득 가능 for Management 점 경로 A) 'No, this is not relevant to our operations' 선택 in 문항 7.60 - 1 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 1/1점입니다. 또는 경로 B) 'No, we do not have a program in place' 선택 in 문항 7.60 - 0/1 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/1점입니다.
